title: RCT Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Skins
description: skins for the main progession for RCT brilliant diamond and shining pearl: gym leaders, rival, team galactic, champion, elite four, etc
body:
A resourcepack that adds Skins for RCTmod brilliant diamond and shining pearl, giving players an easier way to visually spot the trainer in the game.


-Mainline fights


-Gym Leaders


-Elite Four


-Rival


-Commanders of Team Galactic


-Boss of team Galactic


-Cynthia
